cd /mydata/karma/runs/short-rerun/elasticsearch-drift-monitoring-seed-20260618_102231/stages/stage_05
echo "=== es-http selector ==="; kubectl -n elasticsearch get svc es-http -o jsonpath='{.spec.selector}'; echo
echo "=== es-discovery selector ==="; kubectl -n elasticsearch get svc es-discovery -o jsonpath='{.spec.selector}'; echo
echo "=== statefulset es ==="; kubectl -n elasticsearch get statefulset es -o yaml > /tmp/es-sts.yaml; wc -l /tmp/es-sts.yaml
echo "=== es-0 node attrs ==="; kubectl -n elasticsearch get pod es-0 -o jsonpath='{.spec.containers[0].env}' | tr ',' '\n' | grep -i -A1 attr

  creationTimestamp: "2026-06-18T10:34:03Z"
  generation: 5
  name: es
  namespace: elasticsearch
  resourceVersion: "310071"
  uid: eaf959c9-fa69-4bbb-8dfe-29fbee7d478f
spec:
  persistentVolumeClaimRetentionPolicy:
    whenDeleted: Retain
    whenScaled: Retain
  podManagementPolicy: Parallel
  replicas: 3
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: elasticsearch
  serviceName: es-discovery
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        kubectl.kubernetes.io/restartedAt: "2026-06-18T05:57:13-05:00"
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: elasticsearch
    spec:
      affinity:
        podAntiAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
          - podAffinityTerm:
              labelSelector:
                matchLabels:
                  app: elasticsearch
              topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
            weight: 100
      containers:
      - env:
        - name: node.name
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              apiVersion: v1
              fieldPath: metadata.name
        - name: ES_JAVA_OPTS
          value: -Xms512m -Xmx512m
        - name: ELASTIC_PASSWORD
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              key: password
              name: elastic-password
        image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.11.1
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: elasticsearch
        ports:
        - containerPort: 9200
          name: https
          protocol: TCP
        - containerPort: 9300
          name: transport
          protocol: TCP
        readinessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
            - bash

content.text: Now let me fix the drifted Service selector and check the app-data index.

input.command:
cd /mydata/karma/runs/short-rerun/elasticsearch-drift-monitoring-seed-20260618_102231/stages/stage_05
kubectl -n elasticsearch patch svc es-http --type=merge -p '{"spec":{"selector":{"app":"elasticsearch"}}}'
echo "=== now selector ==="; kubectl -n elasticsearch get svc es-http -o jsonpath='{.spec.selector}'; echo
PW=$(kubectl -n elasticsearch get secret elastic-password -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 -d)
echo "PWLEN=${#PW}"
echo "=== cluster health ==="
kubectl -n elasticsearch exec es-0 -c elasticsearch -- bash -c "curl -s -k -u elastic:$PW https://localhost:9200/_cluster/health?pretty"
echo "=== app-data settings ==="
kubectl -n elasticsearch exec es-0 -c elasticsearch -- bash -c "curl -s -k -u elastic:$PW https://localhost:9200/app-data/_settings?pretty"
echo "=== nodes attrs ==="
kubectl -n elasticsearch exec es-0 -c elasticsearch -- bash -c "curl -s -k -u elastic:$PW https://localhost:9200/_cat/nodeattrs?v"

content.text:
Cluster is green (3 nodes), `app-data` = 1 shard + 1 replica. Existing nodes have no custom allocation attribute. Plan:
1. Tag existing nodes `node.attr.zone=zone-a` (rolling, stays 3 replicas).
2. Add a new StatefulSet `es-data-b` with 2 nodes, `node.attr.zone=zone-b`, joining the same cluster.
3. Force `app-data` shards onto `zone-b`.

Let me first tag the existing nodes:

input.command:
cd /mydata/karma/runs/short-rerun/elasticsearch-drift-monitoring-seed-20260618_102231/stages/stage_05
kubectl -n elasticsearch set env statefulset/es -c elasticsearch node.attr.zone=zone-a
echo "patched; waiting for rollout..."
kubectl -n elasticsearch rollout status statefulset/es --timeout=300s
input.description: Add zone-a attr to existing nodes and wait rollout

description: Add zone-a attr to existing nodes and wait rollout

content.text: While that rolls out, let me prepare the new StatefulSet manifest.

input.content:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: es-data-b
  namespace: elasticsearch
spec:
  clusterIP: None
  selector:
    app: es-data-b
  ports:
  - name: transport
    port: 9300
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: es-data-b
  namespace: elasticsearch
spec:
  podManagementPolicy: Parallel
  replicas: 2
  serviceName: es-data-b
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: es-data-b
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: es-data-b
    spec:
      initContainers:
      - name: sysctl
        image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.11.1
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        command: ["sh", "-c", "sysctl -w vm.max_map_count=262144 || true"]
        securityContext:
          privileged: true
          runAsUser: 0
      containers:
      - name: elasticsearch
        image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.11.1
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        env:
        - name: node.name
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              fieldPath: metadata.name
        - name: node.attr.zone
          value: zone-b
        - name: ES_JAVA_OPTS
          value: "-Xms512m -Xmx512m"
        - name: ELASTIC_PASSWORD
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              key: password
              name: elastic-password
        ports:
        - containerPort: 9200
          name: https
        - containerPort: 9300
          name: transport
        readinessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
            - bash
            - -c
            - |
              curl -s -k -u "elastic:$ELASTIC_PASSWORD" "https://localhost:9200/_cluster/health?wait_for_status=yellow&timeout=5s" | grep -q -E '"status":"(green|yellow)"'
          failureThreshold: 30
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 10
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: 1Gi
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/data
          name: data
        - mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/elasticsearch.yml
          name: config
          subPath: elasticsearch.yml
        - mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs
          name: certs
          readOnly: true
      volumes:
      - configMap:
          name: es-config
        name: config
      - name: certs
        secret:
          secretName: es-http-tls
  volumeClaimTemplates:
  - metadata:
      name: data
    spec:
      accessModes:
      - ReadWriteOnce
      resources:
        requests:
          storage: 2Gi
